name: 32" Smart Movable Screen (4K)
shortDescription: 32-Inch 4K Ultra HD Display with movable design, responsive touch screen, built-in speakers and camera, smart functionality and multiple input options.
description: Transform your workspace, classroom, or entertainment area with the AZTECH 32-Inch 4K Smart Movable Touch Screen Display, designed for versatility and high performance. Featuring stunning 4K Ultra HD resolution, this display ensures exceptional image quality with sharp details and vibrant colors, making it ideal for everything from business presentations to interactive learning and entertainment. The touch-responsive screen enables intuitive, hands-on interaction, whether you're navigating presentations, or browsing the web. Its movable design allows for easy adjustment, ensuring a perfect viewing angle in any setting, whether mounted on a stand or used for collaborative meetings. Equipped with smart features and wireless connectivity, it grants access to a variety of apps and streaming options. The AZTECH 32-Inch Touch Screen Display seamlessly blends functionality and modern design, making it the perfect choice for professionals, educators, and multimedia enthusiasts.

name: Heavy-Duty Trolley Stand PRO For 62" to 120"
shortDescription: Heavy-duty trolley stand compatible with 62" to 120" displays, max load 200kg, Max VESA 1200x600, lockable wheels for smooth mobility.
description: The AZTECH Heavy-duty Portable TV Trolley Stand (AZT-CT200P) is the perfect solution for displaying and moving large-screen TVs with ease and confidence. Compatible with LED, LCD, and OLED TVs ranging from 60" to 120", it supports a maximum load of 200kg. With Max VESA 1200x600, it ensures compatibility with a wide range of TV models. The lockable wheels allow for easy mobility and secure placement when needed, making it ideal for both home and commercial use. Perfect for living rooms, offices, showrooms, or even educational and corporate environments, this TV trolley stand is designed for versatility and convenience.

name: Portable Trolley Stand LITE For 32" to 75"
shortDescription: Portable trolley stand compatible with 32" to 75" displays, max load 50kg, Max VESA 600x400, 15° tilt adjustment, lockable wheels.
description: AZTECH Heavy-duty Portable TV Trolley Stand (AZT-CT50L) is the ultimate solution for displaying and moving your large-screen TVs with ease and confidence. Compatible with LED, LCD, and OLED TVs ranging from 32" to 75", it supports a maximum load of 50kg. With ±15° tilt adjustment, you can easily adjust your screen's viewing angle for optimal comfort, while the Max VESA 600x400 ensures compatibility with a wide range of TV models. The lockable wheels allow the trolley to be moved easily and securely locked in place when needed, making it ideal for both home and commercial use. Perfect for living rooms, office spaces, showrooms, or even educational and corporate environments, this TV trolley stand is engineered for versatility and convenience.

name: Wall Mount Bracket LITE For 14" to 24"
shortDescription: Wall mount bracket for 14" to 24" screens, max load 15kg, VESA 75x75–100x100, 360° rotation, 180° tilt, left/right swivel.
description: The AZTECH Wall Mount Bracket (AZT-071FL) is the perfect solution for users seeking flexibility, space efficiency, and reliable performance in a compact design. Built for 14" to 24" screens, it supports up to 15KG load capacity and universal VESA compatibility (75x75mm to 100x100mm) while maintaining a sleek and space-saving profile, ideal for home offices, kitchen setups, or multi-monitor workstations. With its 360° rotation and 180° tilt/swivel capability, this bracket offers full control over viewing angles, allowing you to reduce glare, switch between portrait and landscape modes, and save valuable desk or counter space with ease.

name: Fixed Heavy-Duty Wall Mount PRO For 75" to 120"
shortDescription: Fixed heavy-duty wall mount for 75" to 120" TVs, max load 220kg, Max VESA 1100x600, durable construction, simple installation.
description: AZTECH Fixed Heavy-duty TV Wall Mount Bracket (AZT-1100FP) is a premium-quality wall mount solution designed to ensure an optimal viewing experience and provides a sleek and sturdy solution for securely mounting your TV to the wall. Compatible with LED, LCD, and OLED TVs ranging from 75" to 120" and with its impressive 220kg load capacity and Max VESA size of 1100x600, this mount is engineered to support larger, heavier televisions while maintaining a sleek and minimalist profile. Whether you're arranging your home entertainment system, enhancing your living room layout, or optimizing your office space, this easy-to-install wall mount delivers a secure and reliable solution for your TV.
